description: The Mangeruca are a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia-type criminal organization. They operate in Cornaredo, near Milan, Italy, but originate from Cirò Marina, Calabria. Active since the 1970s, they are involved in construction, furniture businesses, and public establishments such as bars and restaurants. Recent legal actions include arrests and charges for extortion and aggravated robbery.
